The '''Third Legion of Light''' was a unit of the [[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]]. At the end of the [[New Sith Wars]], it was commanded by [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] [[Newar Forrth]], who led it to victory at the cost of his own life during one of the [[Ruusan campaign|battles of Ruusan]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]'' {{1stm}}
